pi_items.source: Explicitly hardcoded in export_result.sh as EXPECTED_OUTPUT and strictly required by verifier.py
Requested in task description and explicitly checked in the VLM prompt within verifier.py
Task instruction and verified programmatically via red pixel mask checks in verifier.py
Programmatic check in verifier.py requiring output_size > 5000 for full points

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a fully synthetic DICOM image generated dynamically at task start. The agent must annotate a bright spot with an ellipse and the text 'URGENT', color them RED, and export a JPEG to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/urgent_finding.jpg. Programmatic evaluation verifies the file path, checks that the file size is > 5000 bytes, and analyzes the image pixels to confirm the presence of red annotations against a grayscale background.
